revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This inline template is used in articles where words are used in a way where [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Expressions that lack precision|their intended meaning is ambiguous]].
This template is a self-reference{{Definition needed|date=May 2025}} and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content.
==Example== : {{Tlx|Definition|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This produces:
: {{Definition|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This template will add the article tagged to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] or a monthly subcategory thereof.
==TemplateData== <templatedata> { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "reason" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "A brief reason for the tag. Because it may not be immediately apparent to other editors what about the tagged passage is in need of further explanation, a brief reason is generally helpful. The reason parameter displays when the mouse cursor is placed over the text the template inserts.", "type": "string", "default": "The preceding text may be too imprecise or indirect for Wikipedia's standards.", "autovalue": "", "suggested": true }, "date": { "label": "Date", "type": "date", "description": "An optional date parameter that records when the tag was added. If this template is added without the date parameter, the date parameter will be added soon after by a [[WP:BOT|bot]].", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true } }, "description": "Use {{Definition}} in the body of an article as a request for other editors to add further explanation to text that assumes a particular meaning of a word.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "date" ] } </templatedata>
==See also== * {{Tl|Definition needed}} – when a statement or a term completely lacks definition * {{Tl|Disambiguation needed}} – for the special case where the term needing clarification is [[Wikipedia:Wikilinks|wikilinked]] to a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation page|disambiguation page]], and you are unable to find a suitable replacement link. * {{Tl|Ambiguous}} – for ambiguous ''statements'' * {{Tl|Clarify}} – for other text that is difficult to understand * {{Tl|Non sequitur}} – for when someone or something has been mentioned for reasons unclear to the reader * {{tl|Which one}} for text which could refer to one of numerous people or items but which is not linked to a disambiguation page.
{{Inline tags}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Coherency templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This inline template is used in articles where words are used in a way where [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Expressions that lack precision|their intended meaning is ambiguous]].
This template is a self-reference{{Definition needed|date=May 2025}} and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content.
==Example== : {{Tlx|Definition|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This produces:
: {{Definition|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This template will add the article tagged to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] or a monthly subcategory thereof.
==TemplateData== <templatedata> { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "reason" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "A brief reason for the tag. Because it may not be immediately apparent to other editors what about the tagged passage is in need of further explanation, a brief reason is generally helpful. The reason parameter displays when the mouse cursor is placed over the text the template inserts.", "type": "string", "default": "The preceding text may be too imprecise or indirect for Wikipedia's standards.", "autovalue": "", "suggested": true }, "date": { "label": "Date", "type": "date", "description": "An optional date parameter that records when the tag was added. If this template is added without the date parameter, the date parameter will be added soon after by a [[WP:BOT|bot]].", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true } }, "description": "Use {{Definition}} in the body of an article as a request for other editors to add further explanation to text that assumes a particular meaning of a word.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "date" ] } </templatedata>
==See also== * {{Tl|Definition needed}} – when a statement or a term completely lacks definition * {{Tl|Disambiguation needed}} – for the special case where the term needing clarification is [[Wikipedia:Wikilinks|wikilinked]] to a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation page|disambiguation page]], and you are unable to find a suitable replacement link. * {{Tl|Ambiguous}} – for ambiguous ''statements'' * {{Tl|Clarify}} – for other text that is difficult to understand * {{Tl|Non sequitur}} – for when someone or something has been mentioned for reasons unclear to the reader * {{tl|Which one}} for text which could refer to one of numerous people or items but which is not linked to a disambiguation page.
{{Inline tags}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Coherency templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This inline template is used in articles where words are used in a way where [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Expressions that lack precision|their intended meaning is ambiguous]].
This template is a self-reference{{Definition needed|date=May 2025}} and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content.
==Example== : {{Tlx|Definition|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This produces:
: {{Definition|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This template will add the article tagged to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] or a monthly subcategory thereof.
==TemplateData== <templatedata> { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "reason" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "A brief reason for the tag. Because it may not be immediately apparent to other editors what about the tagged passage is in need of further explanation, a brief reason is generally helpful. The reason parameter displays when the mouse cursor is placed over the text the template inserts.", "type": "string", "default": "The preceding text may be too imprecise or indirect for Wikipedia's standards.", "autovalue": "", "suggested": true }, "date": { "label": "Date", "type": "date", "description": "An optional date parameter that records when the tag was added. If this template is added without the date parameter, the date parameter will be added soon after by a [[WP:BOT|bot]].", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true } }, "description": "Use {{Definition}} in the body of an article as a request for other editors to add further explanation to text that assumes a particular meaning of a word.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "date" ] } </templatedata>
==See also== * {{Tl|Definition needed}} – when a statement or a term completely lacks definition * {{Tl|Disambiguation needed}} – for the special case where the term needing clarification is [[Wikipedia:Wikilinks|wikilinked]] to a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation page|disambiguation page]], and you are unable to find a suitable replacement link. * {{Tl|Ambiguous}} – for ambiguous ''statements'' * {{Tl|Clarify}} – for other text that is difficult to understand * {{Tl|Non sequitur}} – for when someone or something has been mentioned for reasons unclear to the reader * {{tl|Which one}} for text which could refer to one of numerous people or items but which is not linked to a disambiguation page.
{{Inline tags}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Coherency templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This inline template is used in articles where words are used in a way where [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Expressions that lack precision|their intended meaning is ambiguous]].
This template is a self-reference{{Definition needed|date=May 2025}} and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content.
==Example== : {{Tlx|Definition|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This produces:
: {{Definition|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This template will add the article tagged to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] or a monthly subcategory thereof.
==TemplateData== <templatedata> { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "reason" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "A brief reason for the tag. Because it may not be immediately apparent to other editors what about the tagged passage is in need of further explanation, a brief reason is generally helpful. The reason parameter displays when the mouse cursor is placed over the text the template inserts.", "type": "string", "default": "The preceding text may be too imprecise or indirect for Wikipedia's standards.", "autovalue": "", "suggested": true }, "date": { "label": "Date", "type": "date", "description": "An optional date parameter that records when the tag was added. If this template is added without the date parameter, the date parameter will be added soon after by a [[WP:BOT|bot]].", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true } }, "description": "Use {{Definition}} in the body of an article as a request for other editors to add further explanation to text that assumes a particular meaning of a word.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "date" ] } </templatedata>
==See also== * {{Tl|Definition needed}} – when a statement or a term completely lacks definition * {{Tl|Disambiguation needed}} – for the special case where the term needing clarification is [[Wikipedia:Wikilinks|wikilinked]] to a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation page|disambiguation page]], and you are unable to find a suitable replacement link. * {{Tl|Ambiguous}} – for ambiguous ''statements'' * {{Tl|Clarify}} – for other text that is difficult to understand * {{Tl|Non sequitur}} – for when someone or something has been mentioned for reasons unclear to the reader * {{tl|Which one}} for text which could refer to one of numerous people or items but which is not linked to a disambiguation page.
{{Inline tags}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Coherency templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This inline template is used in articles where words are used in a way where [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Expressions that lack precision|their intended meaning is ambiguous]].
This template is a self-reference{{Definition needed|date=May 2025}} and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content.
==Example== : {{Tlx|Definition|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This produces:
: {{Definition|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This template will add the article tagged to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] or a monthly subcategory thereof.
==TemplateData== <templatedata> { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "reason" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "A brief reason for the tag. Because it may not be immediately apparent to other editors what about the tagged passage is in need of further explanation, a brief reason is generally helpful. The reason parameter displays when the mouse cursor is placed over the text the template inserts.", "type": "string", "default": "The preceding text may be too imprecise or indirect for Wikipedia's standards.", "autovalue": "", "suggested": true }, "date": { "label": "Date", "type": "date", "description": "An optional date parameter that records when the tag was added. If this template is added without the date parameter, the date parameter will be added soon after by a [[WP:BOT|bot]].", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true } }, "description": "Use {{Definition}} in the body of an article as a request for other editors to add further explanation to text that assumes a particular meaning of a word.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "date" ] } </templatedata>
==See also== * {{Tl|Definition needed}} – when a statement or a term completely lacks definition * {{Tl|Disambiguation needed}} – for the special case where the term needing clarification is [[Wikipedia:Wikilinks|wikilinked]] to a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation page|disambiguation page]], and you are unable to find a suitable replacement link. * {{Tl|Ambiguous}} – for ambiguous ''statements'' * {{Tl|Clarify}} – for other text that is difficult to understand * {{Tl|Non sequitur}} – for when someone or something has been mentioned for reasons unclear to the reader * {{tl|Which one}} for text which could refer to one of numerous people or items but which is not linked to a disambiguation page.
{{Inline tags}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Coherency templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Definition%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Definition%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This inline template is used in articles where words are used in a way where [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Expressions that lack precision|their intended meaning is ambiguous]].
This template is a self-reference{{Definition needed|date=May 2025}} and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content.
==Example== : {{Tlx|Definition|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This produces:
: {{Definition|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This template will add the article tagged to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] or a monthly subcategory thereof.
==TemplateData== <templatedata> { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "reason" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "A brief reason for the tag. Because it may not be immediately apparent to other editors what about the tagged passage is in need of further explanation, a brief reason is generally helpful. The reason parameter displays when the mouse cursor is placed over the text the template inserts.", "type": "string", "default": "The preceding text may be too imprecise or indirect for Wikipedia's standards.", "autovalue": "", "suggested": true }, "date": { "label": "Date", "type": "date", "description": "An optional date parameter that records when the tag was added. If this template is added without the date parameter, the date parameter will be added soon after by a [[WP:BOT|bot]].", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true } }, "description": "Use {{Definition}} in the body of an article as a request for other editors to add further explanation to text that assumes a particular meaning of a word.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "date" ] } </templatedata>
==See also== * {{Tl|Definition needed}} – when a statement or a term completely lacks definition * {{Tl|Disambiguation needed}} – for the special case where the term needing clarification is [[Wikipedia:Wikilinks|wikilinked]] to a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation page|disambiguation page]], and you are unable to find a suitable replacement link. * {{Tl|Ambiguous}} – for ambiguous ''statements'' * {{Tl|Clarify}} – for other text that is difficult to understand * {{Tl|Non sequitur}} – for when someone or something has been mentioned for reasons unclear to the reader * {{tl|Which one}} for text which could refer to one of numerous people or items but which is not linked to a disambiguation page.
{{Inline tags}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Coherency templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Definition%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}}
This inline template is used in articles where words are used in a way where [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Words to watch#Expressions that lack precision|their intended meaning is ambiguous]].
This template is a self-reference{{Definition needed|date=May 2025}} and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content.
==Example== : {{Tlx|Definition|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This produces:
: {{Definition|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
This template will add the article tagged to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] or a monthly subcategory thereof.
==TemplateData== <templatedata> { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "reason" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "A brief reason for the tag. Because it may not be immediately apparent to other editors what about the tagged passage is in need of further explanation, a brief reason is generally helpful. The reason parameter displays when the mouse cursor is placed over the text the template inserts.", "type": "string", "default": "The preceding text may be too imprecise or indirect for Wikipedia's standards.", "autovalue": "", "suggested": true }, "date": { "label": "Date", "type": "date", "description": "An optional date parameter that records when the tag was added. If this template is added without the date parameter, the date parameter will be added soon after by a [[WP:BOT|bot]].", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true } }, "description": "Use {{Definition}} in the body of an article as a request for other editors to add further explanation to text that assumes a particular meaning of a word.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "date" ] } </templatedata>
==See also== * {{Tl|Definition needed}} – when a statement or a term completely lacks definition * {{Tl|Disambiguation needed}} – for the special case where the term needing clarification is [[Wikipedia:Wikilinks|wikilinked]] to a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation page|disambiguation page]], and you are unable to find a suitable replacement link. * {{Tl|Ambiguous}} – for ambiguous ''statements'' * {{Tl|Clarify}} – for other text that is difficult to understand * {{Tl|Non sequitur}} – for when someone or something has been mentioned for reasons unclear to the reader * {{tl|Which one}} for text which could refer to one of numerous people or items but which is not linked to a disambiguation page.
{{Inline tags}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Coherency templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
